items.title: June 26, 1996: With the fourth pick in the NBA Draft, the Milwaukee Bucks select Stephon Marbury from Georgia Tech.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 26, 1996: With the fourth pick in the NBA Draft, the Milwaukee Bucks select Stephon Marbury from Georgia Tech.

Less than an hour later, it was announced that Marbury had been traded to the Minnesota Timberwolves for Ray Allen and a first round pick in the 1998 NBA Draft.

items.title: Sources: The Utah Jazz plan to sign Tamar Bates to a two-way deal. He was sidelined with a foot injury as a two-way rookie for the Nuggets after averaging 19.5 points on 55% overall and 44% from 3-point range, 4.4 boards, 2.3 assists, and 1.5 steals in the G League last season.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The Utah Jazz plan to sign Tamar Bates to a two-way deal. He was sidelined with a foot injury as a two-way rookie for the Nuggets after averaging 19.5 points on 55% overall and 44% from 3-point range, 4.4 boards, 2.3 assists, and 1.5 steals in the G League last season.

items.title: If Jose Alvarado's new deal starts at the same $4.5M PO he's declining, and includes 8% raises, it should look like this:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
If Jose Alvarado's new deal starts at the same $4.5M PO he's declining, and includes 8% raises, it should look like this:
26-27: $4.5M
27-28: $4.9M
28-29: $5.2M

Doesn't really change the projection much for the tax or aprons. Somewhere around $14M under the second apron with five open roster spots.

items.title: Spurs' four-game schedule for the Las Vegas Summer League will kick off against Atlanta and former Brennan and University of Houston standout Kingston Flemings at 3:30 p.m. on July 9, the NBA announced Friday.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Spurs' four-game schedule for the Las Vegas Summer League will kick off against Atlanta and former Brennan and University of Houston standout Kingston Flemings at 3:30 p.m. on July 9, the NBA announced Friday.

ESPN2 is set to broadcast the game.

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: Spurs to face Atlanta, San Antonio's Kingston Flemings in Vegas opener
media.description: The NBA on Friday announced the Spurs' four-game schedule, including broadcast details.
